definition:
1. to go to, approach , with dative, (Herdotus Historicus); absolute, (Xenophon Historicus) 
2. to come  or go over to, come in, join , τινί or πρός τινα (Herdotus Historicus), attic; absolute, (Thucydides); also, πρ. ἐς ὁμολογίαν or ὁμολογίᾳ (Herdotus Historicus) 
3. to accede  to an opinion, (Herdotus Historicus); πρ. λόγοις τινός (Sophocles Tragicus): to make concessions , (Euripides) 
4. to approach , i. e. to agree with, be like , τινί or πρός τινα (Herdotus Historicus) 
5. to put faith in, believe , τινί (Herdotus Historicus) (ML)
